title: clematis florida var. lanuginosa
intro: Clematis florida var. lanuginosa, also known as the sweet-scented clematis or woolly clematis, is a flowering vine native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of clematis florida var. lanuginosa include its potential to reduce fever, ease pain, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been used to make teas, tonics, and salves to treat various ailments.
